versions.name: Bear Paw Scout Camp
versions.address: 14000 Bear Paw Camp Ln Mountain, Wisconsin 54149-0128

provenance.notes: Name corrected 2026-07-22 (community/data-quality review): 'Scouts BSA Summer Camp - Bear Paw Scout Camp' was a scraped registration-event title; renamed to the property name, verified against the council's camp listing. Prior id 'wi-scouts-bsa-summer-camp-bear-paw-scout-camp' retired (resolves via aliases.json). Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). verified_at is camp-finder's own source-confirmation date; imported_at is when open-scout-api ingested it. The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
